title: Spawn Egg
description: Adds a spawn egg with which you can create vanilla spawn eggs!
body:
# Spawn Egg

> Having [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) is recommended!

This mod adds spawn egg recipes, e.g. a Creeper Spawn Egg recipe or a Cat Spawn Egg recipe. You might want the mod because you want to have a trading station with villagers, or to spawn a cat, all without cheating.
